text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A fan letter for Haru Urara arrives.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Hey look, Trainer! Someone wrote something
really nice to me!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
They wrote, "Seeing you always try your best
gives me courage!" It's making me blush!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Y'know... This is top secret, but I stayed strong and I only ate two carrots today.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
So, I'm definitely gonna come out on top next
race! That'll definitely make my fans happy, right?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Heehee! That's what I thought! They'll be stoked!
Okey-dokey! I'm gonna give it my all!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Feeling the love from her fans, Haru Urara's
motivation seems to skyrocket.
